item.description:
Version 1.0.4

🌍 Localization

  • Added complete Chinese (Simplified & Traditional) translations for all UI text
  • Cleaned up stale localization entries

🎨 UI Improvements

  • Fixed settings card layout issues where shorter text (e.g., Chinese) caused cards to collapse
  • Improved Battery settings view with proper scrolling when additional controls are visible
  • Redesigned custom duration dialog with better button placement and SF Symbols
  • More consistent spacing and alignment across all settings panels

🔧 Under the Hood

  • Introduced reusable SettingsCard component for cleaner settings UI code
  • Consolidated design constants into a unified design token system
  • General code cleanup and maintainability improvements

What's New

New Features

  • Redesigned Settings Window – Modern native macOS settings experience
  • macOS 14 Sonoma Support – Fully compatible with the latest macOS

Improvements

  • Better Battery Monitoring – More reliable auto-pause when battery is low
  • Reduced Memory Usage – Fixed memory leaks for improved long-term stability
  • Updated Localizations – Improved translations and interface text

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where sleep prevention could stop working unexpectedly
  • Fixed "Allow Display Sleep" option not being applied correctly
  • Fixed notifications not showing in some cases
  • Various stability improvements and crash fixes

Initial Release🎉🎉

  • Initial release of Americano app.
  • Americano is a macOS app that prevents your Mac from sleeping during tasks like downloads and presentations.
